scripts.desktop: npm run build && deno desktop --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build && deno desktop --hmr --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts --disable-auto-update
scripts.desktop:package: npm run build && deno desktop --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts
scripts.desktop:package:all: npm run build && deno desktop --target x86_64-apple-darwin --output ./dist-desktop/macos-x64/Jira-Tracking.app --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts && deno desktop --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output ./dist-desktop/macos-arm64/Jira-Tracking.app --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts && deno desktop --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./dist-desktop/windows-x64/Jira-Tracking --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts && deno desktop --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --output ./dist-desktop/linux-x64/Jira-Tracking --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts && deno desktop --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --output ./dist-desktop/linux-arm64/Jira-Tracking --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS,DENO_DESKTOP_HMR --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts
